found.quote: Vendor will defend and indemnify Customer against third-party claims alleging that the services or Deliverables infringe intellectual property rights or that Vendor's performance violates applicable law.
Vendor may process Customer Data to provide and improve the services, develop analytics, and perform other business purposes reasonably related to the service relationship.
Customer will pay fees for services performed before the effective termination date and approved reimbursable expenses incurred before that date.
Vendor may assign this Agreement or delegate performance to any successor, affiliate, subcontractor, or financing source without Customer's consent.
Vendor will maintain insurance it determines is commercially reasonable, including general liability coverage of at least $250,000 per occurrence if available on commercially reasonable terms.
